subject: Gaming
title: Disco Elysium: The Literary Game
description: A quick, practical guide to Disco Elysium: The Literary Game.

hook.text: A detective RPG with zero combat. You solve crimes through conversation and internal monologue.

buildup.text: ZA/UM built Disco Elysium from a tabletop RPG campaign. The writing team came from literature, not gaming.

discovery.text: Your character's personality traits argue with each other in your head. Logic battles empathy. Drama fights reason.

twist.text: The game lets you fail spectacularly. Being a terrible detective is a valid and hilarious path.

climax.text: Disco Elysium won four awards at The Game Awards 2019. Words alone carried an entire RPG.

punchline.text: No combat. No swords. Just words. The best RPG in years.

quiz.question: What makes Disco Elysium's RPG mechanics unique?
options: Personality traits argue with each other inside your character's mind
